creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Everything you need to know about one of the best travel destinations in Europe 👇

📍Edinburgh, Scotland
 I used to live in Edinburgh and ended up starting my own travel agency where I customised Scotland tours - I shut it down in 2020, so there’s no reason to gatekeep any Edinburgh info 🤠
 Airport transportation ✈️  The Airport Express bus to the city centre takes just 25 minutes & costs £5.50

Top things to do 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿 Climb Calton Hill, Arthur’s Seat or Blackford Hill
The Royal Mile
Leith Shore
St Gile’s Cathedral
Victoria Street (“Diagon Alley”)
National Museum of Scotland
Real Mary King’s Close Dean Village & Water of Leith Edinburgh Castle  Day out in the Pentland Hills
Portobello Beach

Where to stay in Edinburgh 🏨
Virgin Hotels Edinburgh 💸💸💸
The Balmoral 💸💸💸
Apex Waterloo Place 💸💸
Courtyard by Marriott 💸💸
Ibis Edinburgh Centre South 💸
Hub By Premier Inn Haymarket 💸

Best pubs 🍻 The Bailie Bar
The Stockbridge Tap Kay’s Bar Cask & Barrel
The Tourmalet Malt & Hops
Teuchters Landing
The Bow Bar Jolly Judge
The Blue Blazer 
Best restaurants 🍳
Mother India’s Café
Scan & Scallie The Devil’s Advocate 
Nok’s Kitchen The Pakora Bar Sheep Heid Inn

Best coffee shops ☕️
Thomas J Walls The Milkman Artisan Roast Broughton St
OQO The Pantry Williams & Johnson

I’ve also got 3 long-form videos about Edinburgh over on my YT (search for Destination Well Known) and a couple of travel guides on my website (link in bio) if you want more Edinburgh tips ✌️

I think Edinburgh is one of the best weekend getaway destinations in Europe - let me know your favourite city for a 2-3 day trip in the comments 🥰  #edinburgh #traveltips #europetravel

transcription.text: He watches Trainspotting, fifteen times a week.
